Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sign says, "The fortune[n]box is undergoing repairs."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sign says, "Relationship[n]Fortune - 100 yen"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...But they're out of tickets for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sign says, "Relationship[n]Fortune - 100 yen"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day here[n]and draw a fortune...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have 100 yen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Who should I think of...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no one who I feel I[n]can deepen my bond with...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hear a divine message...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Blessings to the believer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Today's luck is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fortune says, "You will have fair luck."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Money may also be in your future."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I found a crumpled up[n]1,000-yen bill in my pocket![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fortune says, "You[n]will have a little luck."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"You will not be significantly[n]lucky or unlucky with money."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I found a 500-yen coin in my pocket![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fortune says, "You will have bad luck."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"Be careful with your money."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What happened to all my money...!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey... 1,000 yen just fell out[n]of my pocket and blew away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fortune says, "You will have great luck!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"You will have no financial worries."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a {f 4 4 1 37 1 0}[n]inside the fortune ticket![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I found a crumpled up[n]10,000-yen bill in my pocket![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fortune says, "You will[n]have the very worst luck..."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"You are headed towards financial disaster."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hey... 5,000 yen just fell out[n]of my pocket and blew away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've drawn my fortune. I hope[n]I can deepen my bond...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I suddenly feel closer to {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I suddenly feel closer to the monk...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I suddenly feel closer to[n]Bunkichi-san and Mitsuko-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think there's much[n]reason to draw this fortune...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll think of {f 2 4 0}[n]as I draw a fortune...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll think of the monk as I draw a fortune...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll think of Bunkichi-san and[n]Mitsuko-san as I draw a fortune...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like the bond I have with[n]{f 2 4 0} has grown stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like the bond I have with[n]the monk has grown stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like the bond I have with Bunkichi-san[n]and Mitsuko-san has grown stronger...[n]{f 1 1}
